title: salix × rijosa
intro: Salix × rijosa, also known as Rijosa's willow or hybrid willow, is a hybrid plant derived from the cross between two willow species, Salix alba and Salix fragilis. The bark and leaves of the Salix × rijosa plant contain salicin, a compound with medicinal properties similar to aspirin, which has anti-inflammatory and pain-relieving effects. The health benefits of Salix × rijosa include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and lowering fever, making it a popular herbal remedy for treating various health conditions, such as arthritis and headaches. Salix × rijosa can be used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be taken internally to leverage its medicinal properties.
